description: Discussion on the Solana Validator Community's postmortem regarding the outage on February 25, 2023. Key topics included the need for timely restarts, empowering validators, and improving communication methods during outages.
topic_summary: The community led a postmortem on the February 25 outage, discussing highlights from the call led by Chris Remus and Max Sherwood. They emphasized the importance of quick restarts [t=152.95], empowering validators [t=172.96], and improving snapshot verification [t=264.73].
